label: Email Service
description: Sends order confirmation emails to customers after checkout. Receives order details via gRPC, renders an HTML confirmation email from a Jinja2 template, and delivers it. Currently runs in dummy mode, logging email requests rather than sending via an external mail provider.
responsibilities: Receive order confirmation requests via gRPC
Render HTML confirmation emails from order data using a Jinja2 template
Send confirmation emails to customer email addresses (dummy mode: log only)
